nodes.summary: SVG favicon (600x780) for KalkMate website with nested svg elements containing vector path data depicting a stylized calculator/device icon; includes embedded CSS media-query style block that inverts colors in dark color-scheme.
nodes.notes: Triple-nested <svg> tags; viewBox 700 480 600 780; transform translate(0,2000) scale(0.1,-0.1); fill #000000; multiple <path> elements forming calculator silhouette with keypad cells; embedded <style> uses prefers-color-scheme media queries (light: filter none; dark: filter invert(100%)).

summary: Chunk 14: KalkMate website favicon.svg — vector calculator icon with dark-mode inversion via prefers-color-scheme CSS.
